revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Use the attached reference image as the character identity reference. Treat this as re-posing the exact same character from the reference, not redesigning a new character. Match the reference character's proportions, head-to-body ratio, body width, palette, outline style, pixel density, total height, scale, and slim-but-sturdy balance exactly.

Profile: snes16_platformer_v1
Preset: hd_motion8_256
Asset kind: animated-sprite
Asset type: sprite
Exact sheet size: 1024x512px
Grid: 2 rows x 4 columns
Frame size: 256x256px
Frames: 8
Background: solid #FF00FF chroma key filling all empty space, no gradients.

STRICT SHEET LAYOUT:
- Clean 4x2 sheet with 8 equal 256x256 cells, but do not draw visible grid lines, separator lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, logos, UI, or watermarks.
- TOP row = frames 1-4 left to right.
- BOTTOM row = frames 5-8 left to right.
- Exactly one character per cell, centered with clear solid magenta margin on all four sides.
- Every frame must stay completely inside its own cell.
- No body part, sword piece, streamer, tassel, hair, outline, shadow, or stray fragment may cross a cell boundary.
- No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, leftover effect residue, random decoration, birds, companions, or objects.

PIXEL ART STYLE:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art with readable pixel clusters.
- No antialiasing blur.
- Consistent palette across all frames.
- Dark one-pixel outline where useful.
- Top-left light source.
- Bright cheerful mythical-Japan action RPG colors.

CHARACTER IDENTITY LOCK:
Hero Mito, facing DOWN toward viewer in a top-down 3/4 view, face visible. Androgynous 15-year-old wanderer. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eyes. Outfit: white tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At his LEFT hip hangs a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard, wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers; it reads as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

CRITICAL PROPORTION RULE:
- Exact same character scale in every frame.
- Same head size, same head-to-body ratio, same body width, same limb thickness, same total height in every frame.
- Re-pose only; do not redraw, restyle, resize, widen, shrink, or change costume details.
- Standing body height in pixels must match across all upright frames.

STANCE RULE:
- Standing relaxed and natural.
- Both feet planted shoulder-width apart, with a visible gap of empty magenta ground between the two ankles.
- Legs nearly vertical and relaxed.
- Feet never move between frames.
- Do not draw legs or feet touching, pressed together, crossed, stepping, walking, jumping, or in a wide horse stance.
- Weight evenly on both feet.
- Feet on the same ground line in every cell.
- Head at the same height in every neutral/upright cell except only the specified 1px breathing offsets.

SWORD RULE:
- The white scabbard stays sheathed at his LEFT hip in the exact same position, angle, and length in every frame.
- The sword must not drift, rotate, lengthen, shorten, or change silhouette between frames.
- Only the tiny paper streamers may sway subtly.

8-FRAME SUBTLE BREATHING LOOP, one direction only, facing down:
Frame 1: neutral relaxed stance, eyes open.
Frame 2: slow inhale, chest and shoulders rise 1-2 pixels, feet unchanged.
Frame 3: inhale peak, head lifts 1 pixel, shoulders slightly raised, feet unchanged.
Frame 4: breath held, same body height as inhale peak, cord tassels and tiny paper streamers drift subtly.
Frame 5: exhale begins, shoulders settle toward neutral, feet unchanged.
Frame 6: lowest relaxed point, body 1-2 pixels lower than neutral, feet unchanged, calm expression.
Frame 7: calm blink, eyes closed, body returns toward neutral, feet unchanged.
Frame 8: eyes open, back to neutral stance matching frame 1 so the loop repeats seamlessly.

Motion must be quiet and small. Silhouette change between frames is subtle and smooth, not an action pose. Haori hem, vermilion cord tassels, and sword paper streamers sway very subtly throughout.

Avoid any Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna, or other existing character likenesses, logos, emblems, or text. Avoid samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, UI, watermarks, and letter emblems.

Final output must be exactly one clean 1024x512 PNG sprite sheet with solid #FF00FF background and no extra images.
